headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels to host investor day focused on data analytics strategy

sentiment.reasoning: Investor days are routine corporate events that rarely provide immediate material financial impact.

sentiment.reasoning: Strategic pivots are high-level announcements that lack immediate financial quantification or execution certainty.

sentiment.reasoning: Completing a planned facility upgrade is an operational milestone that likely has already been priced in as part of capital expenditure plans.

headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels announces $5.7B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program directly improves earnings per share and signals management confidence in the stock.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
